data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Open and click tracking', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of this feature. The absence of any evidence related to tracking opens and clicks indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of open and click tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
